question: Which authentication endpoint do new integrations use? Answer with the path only.

records.text: Integration guide: new integrations use the authentication endpoint /auth/v1/token.
Platform notice: new integrations use the authentication endpoint /auth/v2/token; this replaces the earlier integration guide.
